{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323014130CC0860250B9F82BFBB3E"}"},"total":104},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7261335217817928504","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得还真是太好了，主角可以在聊天群里认识不少影视动漫人物，可以互相交流人物对话十分丰富没有任何毛病，那是非常好看的聊天群同文书。","text_exts":[{"e":17,"s":14,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420129082BFBB3E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227261335217817928504%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203723992824286219%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690662057,"group_id":"7203723992824286219","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我只是二次元角色而已。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2hYqayus7QUWtXPKa9jJYc=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba8bb821271e4851869129238a916ed0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792549&x-signature=cZeuJsbsOXB5t7qi57qSHtexZvA%3D","user_id":"67969933998","user_name":"用户67969933"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"67969933998","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7203723992824286219","book_info":{"abstract":"（无女主+不忽悠+不拆原CP+不暧昧+一起成长流）
“岳掌门你跟九叔就别闹了，还有你托尼。。”林萧看着这几个闹腾的有点无语，当然还有灰原哀这个腹黑的，时不时来调侃下他，她现在掌握了一切情报，名侦探可就惨咯，还有陆小千你多带傻妞出来啊，凉冰女王你能不能先不要跟你姐姐吵架了啊，你又吵不过的。
说起来在聊天群的日子还真是欢乐，群里的这些群员们还真是各有各的特点，其中灰原哀，凉冰，佐助，花满楼，八神庵，小樱，九叔，张真人，蓝兔，马小玲，迪路兽，艾斯德斯等等，就看后面怎么发展了，不过这些人也有让头疼的存在
ps：关于战力方面一切以聊天群为主，聊天群战力是无法平衡的，也不用洪荒，修真系统来平衡，不喜勿喷。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o9cf9a3ee60e06375eb634c1959f6314d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"院道长","author_id":"","book_id":"7203723992824286219","book_name":"聊天群：我去这个群画风不正常","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b0b8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1852人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7204079755078533693","read_count":"1852","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1073537"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"561","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,系统,聊天群,无女主,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cf2701375d1a5b791ecf4cc8b63de693~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779385290&x-signature=3d2sj6ZlqkXRfu1maDnkTIgK4SM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104123972974","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.464106e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323014130CC0860250B9F82BFBB3E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读58分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3464,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3507},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7231874063161082661","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯目前来看还是十分不错的。挺符合我胃口的。嗯，小时候比较喜欢的聊天群类型。后来因为主角的更新换代就没看了。这本书重新燃起了我对聊天群类小说的希望。目前看起来还是不错的，希望作者可以多更一点。因为根本不够看啊,缺点有一个，但有可能原因在我身上。好多主人物我都不认识啊。是在下孤陋寡闻了。","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":31,"text":"聊天群","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177420129082BFBB3E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227231874063161082661%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227203723992824286219%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%81%8A%E5%A4%A9%E7%BE%A4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1683802013,"group_id":"7203723992824286219","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"热爱游戏，动漫，小说，愿成为更好的自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5utn5bfzWC4pszv/vjAKxU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/20b4097ad1bf44e9b9e2296726781a9a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789258&x-signature=z3cbNW5AZeOZjKMeT5%2FXl1o93HU%3D","user_id":"106489967614","user_name":"秋风不应沐雨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106489967614","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":fal
